description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-breadcrumb. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-breadcrumb-item** (`hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-breadcrumb AND hx-breadcrumb-item. Verify ARIA roles (navigation/breadcrumb pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation, screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-breadcrumb-item API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements. Create a minimal HTML page that renders correctly.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-05: Use `div[role="list"]` instead of `<ul>/<ol>` with slotted web components
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/` (includes hx-breadcrumb-item.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-breadcrumb.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-breadcrumb

descriptionHistory.description: Launch readiness audit for hx-breadcrumb. Using the documentation template, ensure production-ready. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, proper nav landmark, aria-label, aria-current on last item, WCAG 2.1 AA. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Known patterns: C-PATTERN-01, C-PATTERN-02, C-PATTERN-05 (list role). Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-breadcrumb.md`

Launch readiness audit for hx-breadcrumb. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-breadcrumb-item** (`hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-breadcrumb AND hx-breadcrumb-item. Verify ARIA roles (navigation/breadcrumb pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation, screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-breadcrumb-item API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements. Create a minimal HTML page that renders correctly.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-05: Use `div[role="list"]` instead of `<ul>/<ol>` with slotted web components
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/` (includes hx-breadcrumb-item.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-breadcrumb.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
